column5:
A section for B2B businesses shipping products to retailers, distributors, branches, trade customers or commercial partners across the UK and internationally. 

Focus on reliability, delivery consistency, cost control and scalable shipping support for growing businesses. 

Messaging needs to highlight access to competitive rates across 85+ carriers, timed and tracked delivery services, pallet and parcel options, centralised returns support and depot coverage across Manchester, Birmingham and London. 

Include international shipping support with automated customs documentation and integrations with ERP, ecommerce and warehouse systems where relevant.

CTA: Get Started.
